themes: Manager-heavy, long-tail backlog: The overwhelming majority of contacts are Managers, meaning conversations should center on practical, time-saving improvements to day-to-day location reporting and workflow tasks rather than executive strategy.

Chronic wait times signal trust risk: With dozens of contacts waiting over 100 days — several approaching or exceeding a year — prompt, personalized outreach is critical to rebuilding credibility before these customers disengage entirely.

Repeat accounts indicate systemic pain: Multiple contacts from the same accounts (Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Avenue5 Residential, Holiday Inn Express, Ford, Anytime Fitness, 29th Street Living, Balfour Beatty, Vetcor, Orangetheory, LivCor, Garner, Neighborly, Cruise Planners) suggest unresolved, organization-wide friction points that likely require coordinated product responses rather than one-off fixes.
